title: All you need to know about missing former Air Force General with 'UFO secrets'

title: General linked to top secret UFO lab vanishes as authorities launch urgent search
description: Retired Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, was reported missing after not being seen since Friday in New Mexico. He is suffering from a medical condition.
